arts.ttl: Paul Merson shares Ruben Amorim Manchester United 'regret' theory as fresh doubts emerge
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim has struggled in his first few months at Man United and former Arsenal midfielder Paul Merson has shared his concern

arts.ttl: Man United forward Antony joins Real Betis on loan
arts.sum: Manchester United winger Antony completed a loan move to Real Betis on Saturday that will keep him at the Spanish club for the rest of the season. Brazil international Antony was a $95 million signing from Ajax in 2022 and expected to be a leading light for United.

arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: Red Devils confirm loan exit of struggling attacker
arts.sum: Manchester United forward Antony joins La Liga outfit Real Betis on loan for the second half of the 2024-25 campaign.

arts.ttl: Pressure at Man Utd is the highest - De Ligt
arts.sum: Dion Dublin speaks with Matthijs de Ligt to discuss pressure at Manchester United and finding solutions to bad results.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim sent 'dressing room' warning in Manchester United 'worst team' row
arts.athr: newsdesk@men-news.co.uk (Thomas Fair, Manchester Evening News readers)
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim has been very public with his frustrations at being Manchester United manager

arts.ttl: Barcelona 'desperate to get rid of winger' amid links with Marcus Rashford with Jose Mourinho's Fenerbahce interested in deal
arts.sum: Barcelona are eager for one of their wingers to leave before the closure of the transfer window. Hansi Flick's side are interested in a potential loan move for Manchester United's Marcus Rashford.

arts.ttl: Antony joins Real Betis on loan until end of season
arts.sum: Manchester United winger Antony joins La Liga side Real Betis on loan until the end of the season.

arts.ttl: Liverpool’s transformation into 1990s Manchester United is complete
arts.sum: Liverpool 4-1 Ipswich: The Reds appear to be cruising to the Premier League title as relegation-threatened Ipswich were the latest side to be demolished

arts.ttl: Man Utd winger Antony joins Real Betis on loan
arts.sum: Real Betis have signed Manchester United winger Antony on loan for the remainder of the season, subject to international clearance.

arts.ttl: Rio Ferdinand is flawed but pay attention as Rangers prodigy's body language blows Man Utd hero away | Scott McDermott
arts.sum: He knows a gifted footballer when he sees one and Bailey Rice has him purring
